6847eac5-a155-4be6-9d60-dcc35fb1bd9b.title: Note
6847eac5-a155-4be6-9d60-dcc35fb1bd9b.text:
has dialogue for Waterfall Quest
and Desert Treasure I.

fc495681-80de-4f62-aa9c-9c0ab0b550b1.title: Hadley
fc495681-80de-4f62-aa9c-9c0ab0b550b1.text:
Well hello, come in, come in, my name's Hadley, I'm
head of tourism here. There's some of the most unspoilt
wildlife and scenery in Gielinor here. People come from
miles around to fish in the clear lakes or to wander the

79383768-4442-4b33-9620-86763643f0b7.title: Hadley
79383768-4442-4b33-9620-86763643f0b7.text:
Surely pretty is an understatement kind sir. Beautiful,
amazing or possibly life-changing would be more suitable
wording. Have you seen Baxtorian Falls? Named after
the elven king who was buried beneath them.

options.text: What happened to the elven king?
Where else is worth visiting around here?
I don't like nature, it gives me a rash!
Thanks, goodbye.

14810599-9240-419f-9a38-8eab54626015.title: <player>
14810599-9240-419f-9a38-8eab54626015.text: I don't like nature, it gives me a rash!

1edd9161-d90b-4094-821f-39ea9c546d35.title: <player>
1edd9161-d90b-4094-821f-39ea9c546d35.text: Where else is worth visiting around here?

eef9da58-0965-4497-8400-0fc614f12fc8.title: Hadley
eef9da58-0965-4497-8400-0fc614f12fc8.text:
Well, there's a wide variety of wildlife, although
unfortunately most of it's quite dangerous. Please don't
feed the goblins.

1b761fab-afe5-42b7-a8ae-8024f2c0e452.title: Hadley
1b761fab-afe5-42b7-a8ae-8024f2c0e452.text:
There is a lovely spot for a picnic on the hill to the
north east, there's a monument to the elven queen
Glarial. It really is quite pretty.

options.text: What happened to the elven king?
I don't like nature, it gives me a rash!
Thanks, goodbye.

c8cb9345-15a7-4635-923d-01ac175ec990.title: <player>
c8cb9345-15a7-4635-923d-01ac175ec990.text: What happened to the elven king?

d86bdb91-5d89-4526-a414-9e42f15f4e46.title: Hadley
d86bdb91-5d89-4526-a414-9e42f15f4e46.text:
Baxtorian? I guess he died a long long time ago, it's
quite sad really. After leaving his kingdom to deal with
invading forces, Baxtorian returned to find his wife
Glarial had been captured by the enemy.

9459cb56-2add-480d-ac1f-ec4538bc90a3.title: Hadley
9459cb56-2add-480d-ac1f-ec4538bc90a3.text:
This destroyed Baxtorian, after years of searching he
became a recluse. He went into the secret home he had
made for Glarial under the waterfall and sealed himself
in. To this day, no one has managed to enter.

options.text: Where else is worth visiting around here?
I don't like nature, it gives me a rash!
Thanks, goodbye.

27e75643-943a-48bd-9695-6f3dd470f8ee.title: Hadley
27e75643-943a-48bd-9695-6f3dd470f8ee.text:
Are you on holiday? If so you've come to the right
place. I'm Hadley the tourist guide, anything you need
to know just ask me. We have some of the most
unspoilt wildlife and scenery in Gielinor.

5d6e83fe-4ab1-4fc9-bef6-3251b47afa13.title: Hadley
5d6e83fe-4ab1-4fc9-bef6-3251b47afa13.text:
People come from miles around to fish in the clear lakes
or to wander the beautiful hillsides.

bca7771d-77ab-416b-b16f-93239fbedb35.title: Hadley
bca7771d-77ab-416b-b16f-93239fbedb35.text:
Surely pretty is an understatement, sir. Beautiful,
amazing or possibly life-changing would be more suitable
wording. Have you seen Baxtorian Falls? Named after
the elven king who was buried beneath them.

options.text: Can you tell me what happened to the elven king?
Where else is worth visiting around here?
Is there treasure under the waterfall?
Thanks, goodbye.

24096c4a-607e-4703-9b94-7c14bd682e6a.title: <player>
24096c4a-607e-4703-9b94-7c14bd682e6a.text: Is there treasure under the waterfall?

15e851b3-d128-4620-bacc-6243e179c03d.title: Hadley
15e851b3-d128-4620-bacc-6243e179c03d.text:
Ha ha... Another treasure hunter. Well if there is no
one's been able to get to it. They've been searching that
river for decades, all to no avail.

options.text: Can you tell me what happened to the elven king?
Where else is worth visiting around here?
Thanks, goodbye.

cbc07845-4851-4c69-bbb4-d665f460c0b3.title: <player>
cbc07845-4851-4c69-bbb4-d665f460c0b3.text: Can you tell me what happened to the elven king?

089603a7-1303-43a2-a5cb-c78cc6768302.title: Hadley
089603a7-1303-43a2-a5cb-c78cc6768302.text:
Baxtorian? I guess he died a long long time ago, it's
quite sad really. After leaving his kingdom to deal with
invading forces, Baxtorian returned to find his wife
Glarial had been captured by the enemy.

5ac30f37-0dd9-4261-8302-73d03d8d9f2e.title: Hadley
5ac30f37-0dd9-4261-8302-73d03d8d9f2e.text:
This destroyed Baxtorian, after years of searching he
became a recluse. He went into the secret home he had
made for Glarial under the waterfall and sealed himself
in. To this day, no one has managed to enter.

65061ae1-9549-4101-81de-25984ce38fbb.title: Hadley
65061ae1-9549-4101-81de-25984ce38fbb.text:
Anyway, I believe we have a book on him upstairs if
you want to learn more.

options.text: Where else is worth visiting around here?
Is there treasure under the waterfall?
Thanks, goodbye.

6a48939b-e18f-413f-b285-62daee91c058.title: <player>
6a48939b-e18f-413f-b285-62daee91c058.text: Where else is worth visiting around here?

08c9c308-2a3f-4432-9668-091cadb9f986.title: Hadley
08c9c308-2a3f-4432-9668-091cadb9f986.text:
There is a lovely spot for a picnic on the hill to the
north east, there's a monument to the elven queen
Glarial. It really is quite pretty.

ea60d206-2200-42c0-b7d0-9f3b297370b5.title: Hadley
ea60d206-2200-42c0-b7d0-9f3b297370b5.text:
Baxtorian's wife, the only other person who could also
enter the waterfall apart from him. She was queen when
this land was inhabited by elven kind.

24d4133f-9982-4612-965a-12159514fe80.title: Hadley
24d4133f-9982-4612-965a-12159514fe80.text:
Glarial was kidnapped while Baxtorian was away, but
they eventually recovered her body and brought her
home to rest.

113c567b-f886-4c8b-a86d-b586bda14a29.title: Hadley
113c567b-f886-4c8b-a86d-b586bda14a29.text:
True, I believe we have a book on Baxtorian and
Glarial upstairs if you want to learn more.

options.text: Can you tell me what happened to the elven king?
Is there treasure under the waterfall?
Thanks, goodbye.

7952be47-e33d-4f6a-aa9b-07ab0e714f6e.title: Note
7952be47-e33d-4f6a-aa9b-07ab0e714f6e.text: updates quest log with book location

75771188-0965-4076-ab63-8220fa9f1d7d.title: Note
75771188-0965-4076-ab63-8220fa9f1d7d.text:
players can skip talking to any of the NPCs and go straight to the bookshelf for the book
if players do speak with the fisherman or mother, they will point them to Hadley, talking with Hadley
reveals information about Glarial or the king and will mention the book thats upstairs.

8bb43e0e-43a8-40e4-b8dd-98668b8a0587.title: Note
8bb43e0e-43a8-40e4-b8dd-98668b8a0587.text: also will update quest log about the book

d848a03c-0d5d-4a4f-9938-c0f06bbf7190.title: Hadley
d848a03c-0d5d-4a4f-9938-c0f06bbf7190.text:
I hope you're enjoying your stay, there should be lots
of useful infomation in that book you've got. Make sure
you give it a read.
